troubleshooting_step_1.description: Verify the LMS API request works and parameters are transmitted correctly.

troubleshooting_step_2.description: Verify the LMS recorded the submission event.

troubleshooting_step_3.description: Verify the gradebook entry associated with the submission was created.

troubleshooting_step_4.description: Test grade/gradebook visibility using a second instructor account to determine whether the issue is user-specific (permissions/role/cache).

primary_instructor.ui_behavior: Grade entry UI is missing/disabled or changes do not persist.
primary_instructor.notes: Primary instructor can see the submission and gradebook row, but cannot successfully enter or save a grade.

alternate_instructor.ui_behavior: Grade entry UI works and grade saves successfully.
alternate_instructor.notes: Alternate instructor can grade the same attempt without issue.

instructor_visibility_check.conclusion: Likely user-specific configuration issue (role/permissions) or UI cache/session issue affecting the primary instructor account.

troubleshooting_step_5.description: Checked LMS API rate limits to ensure no throttling was preventing data retrieval.

rate_limit_check.notes: No 429 responses observed. Remaining requests are available; throttling is not preventing grade retrieval.
